title: Create playwright.config.ts
acceptance_criteria: testDir './e2e', chromium-only project, workers: 1, baseURL http://localhost:3000

webServer runs 'npm run dev' with env DEV_DATABASE_URL=file:./e2e.db, NEXTAUTH_SECRET set to a dummy value, AUTH_PROVIDER=nextauth, NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000, RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR=100000; reuseExistingServer: false; webServer.timeout: 180000
forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI; retries: process.env.CI ? 1 : 0; trace: 'on-first-retry'; generous navigation/expect timeouts
reporters: list + html (html report dir 'playwright-report', open: 'never')
File is valid TypeScript and excluded from vitest by the existing '**/*.config.*' exclude (no action needed beyond naming)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
